nasb.text: “Son of man, the house of Israel has become dross to Me; all of them are bronze and tin and iron and lead in the furnace; they are the dross of silver.

esv.text: “Son of man, the house of Israel has become dross to me; all of them are bronze and tin and iron and lead in the furnace; they are dross of silver.

cnv.text: “人子啊！以色列家在我看來已成了渣滓；他們都是爐中的銅、錫、鐵和鉛；就是銀的渣滓。

ccb.text: “人子啊，在我看来，以色列人已经变成了渣滓。他们是炉中的铜、锡、铁、铅，都是银渣滓。
